summary: Comprehensive testing of Recruitment Analytics Dashboard after relational integrity refactor. All 34 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified login, dashboard counts, hierarchical panels, data modals, upload modal, and logout. All relational integrity constraints validated: sub-categories are strict subsets of registered_candidates collection.

backend: API health check - returns healthy status v4.0
Auth check with valid cookie - returns authenticated
Upload Naukri CSV - processes 10 records correctly
Upload Pipeline CSV - processes 7 records correctly
Dashboard counts structure - all 9 fields present
registered = 7 (INNER JOIN of naukri and pipeline)
Unregistered endpoint returns Harry, Ivy, Jack ONLY
Rejected endpoint returns Bob Smith and Frank Garcia
Not Scheduled endpoint returns Diana Lee and Eve Wilson
Attended endpoint returns Alice, Charlie, Grace
Not Attended endpoint returns Bob, Diana, Eve, Frank
frontend: Login page loads with form elements
Login with admin/admin redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows correct summary cards (Total=10, Registered=7, Unregistered=3)
Expanding Registered shows Shortlisted(6) and Rejected(2)
Expanding Shortlisted shows Scheduled(5) and Not Scheduled(2)
Expanding Scheduled shows Attended(3) and Not Attended(4)
Clicking Unregistered panel opens modal with Harry, Ivy, Jack
Clicking Attended panel opens modal with Alice, Charlie, Grace
Data table modal shows correct columns and pagination
Upload Datasets button opens upload modal
Upload modal shows both Naukri and Pipeline sections
Logout button redirects to login page

seed_data_creation: Test data uploaded via /app/test_data/naukri_test.csv (10 records) and /app/test_data/pipeline_test.csv (7 records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly after relational integrity refactor. Key architectural change: registered_candidates collection is the INNER JOIN of naukri_applies and pipeline_data. All sub-category endpoints (shortlisted, rejected, scheduled, not-scheduled, attended, not-attended) query from registered_candidates NOT from pipeline_data directly. This ensures all sub-categories are strict subsets of Registered. Verified partitions: scheduled+not_scheduled=registered, attended+not_attended=registered. UPSERT logic works correctly - re-uploading same data updates records instead of duplicating.
